questions.question: In Mobile Application Build Service (MABS), and assuming you are deploying multiple mobile apps at once, each mobile app will be queued and processed in paralled in a isolated sandbox (one sandbox for each app) to ensure information is always secure

options.text: TRUE
FALSE

source.correctAnswerText: TRUE

questions.question: Should a developer functional testing?

options.text: Yes. Besides the unit tests, the Developer should also test a User Story from a functional perspective to ensure a high quality delivery
No. Developers should only performs unit tests. The Product Owner and the Business Analyst should handle the Functional testing
Yes, but only in project with 3-week iterations. Otherwise their time needs to be fully dedicated to the implementation and unit tests
No, The functional tests are responsibility of the Product Owner and the Business Analyst, who together with the Tester and the Key Users, determine if the User Stories were implemented properly

source.correctAnswerText: Yes. Besides the unit tests, the Developer should also test a User Story from a functional perspective to ensure a high quality delivery

questions.question: Which role best describes the following: "Seek the complete definition of business processes with key users. Break business processes down into User Stories and provide the Acceptance Criteria. Facilitate backlog prioritization and Iteration Planning. Participate in acceptance testing"

options.text: Business Sponsor
Business Analyst
Testers/ QA Coordinator
Product Owner

source.correctAnswerText: Business Analyst

questions.question: Which is NOT a part of Manifesto for Software Craftsmanship

options.text: Not only Delivering on time but also Meeting the market needs
Not only Customer collaboration but also Productive Partnerships
Not only Working software but also Well-crafted software
Not only Individuals and interactions but also a Community of professionals

source.correctAnswerText: Not only Delivering on time but also Meeting the market needs

questions.question: Outsystems can set security configurations at the environmental level such as HTTPS Security, add Content Security Policy and Mobile Apps Authentication. Where can this be set?

options.text: Lifetime
Service Center
Service Center and Lifetime

source.correctAnswerText: Service Center and Lifetime

questions.question: What is NOT expected from a Tech Lead? (before iteration)

options.text: Responsible for technical solution and non-functional requirements
Drill-down of requirements into well-defined tasks
Design scalable and high performance architectures
Negotiate with End Users on requirements and prioritize user-stories

source.correctAnswerText: Negotiate with End Users on requirements and prioritize user-stories

questions.question: Which of the following options is not a responsibility of the Tech Lead?

options.text: Ensure coding best practices are followed
Protect the development team from disruptions
Act as the user to focus on business value
Technical solution ownership and delivery

source.correctAnswerText: Act as the user to focus on business value

questions.question: What is the best course of action when prioritizing User Stories for an Iteration / sprint?

options.text: Cross the overall epic structure as much as possible, In order to get to the MP as fast as possible
Try to validate as many User Stones of the highest prioritized epic as possible
Start with the most risky ones, Independently of the epic they belong to, to avoid breaking other features later
Select the User Stones that were derived from the available business users

source.correctAnswerText: Cross the overall epic structure as much as possible, In order to get to the MP as fast as possible

questions.question: Which of the below is TRUE?

options.text: The Log Mechanism logs by type into a single database table. The logs are written using internal ΑΡΙ
The Log Mechanism logs by type into a single database table. The logs are written using external ΑΡΙ
The Log Mechanism logs by type into a multiple database table. The logs are written using external ΑΡΙ
The Log Mechanism logs by type into a multiple database table. The logs are written using internal ΑΡΙ

source.correctAnswerText: The Log Mechanism logs by type into a multiple database table. The logs are written using internal ΑΡΙ

questions.question: Consider a query defined with a SQL element that needs to be filtered using a dynamic set of values coming from a previous Action. A developer suggests transforming the output of the Action into a string of comma separated values, and then pass it as an expanded inline parameter to the query. Following best practices, what is the best course of action?

options.text: Avoid the suggestion. There is a good chance that the inline parameters change too often for the database engine to be able to optimize execution plans
Avoid the suggestion. Since the values need to be passed as a non-expanded inline parameter, for the database engine to be able to optimize the query at runtime
Use the suggestion. This way, we reduce the number of inputs that need to be passed to the database calls and query executions, achieving better performance
Use the suggestion. This way, the result from the previous query or action can be reused in the current query, achieving better performance

source.correctAnswerText: Avoid the suggestion. There is a good chance that the inline parameters change too often for the database engine to be able to optimize execution plans

questions.question: With the first option having the top priority and the last option having the lowest priority. What is the common way to describe how the project features should be prioritized according to the Agile methodology?

options.text: 1 Must have features 2 would have features 3 Could have features
1 Must have features 2 Could have features 3 Should have features
1 Should have features 2 would have features 3 could have features
1 Must have features 2 Should have features 3 could have features

source.correctAnswerText: 1 Must have features 2 Should have features 3 could have features

questions.question: Regarding environments in Outsystems, which of the following options is correct?

options.text: The platform server is installed in a single environment, and the other environments point to it
Each environment has its own platform server

source.correctAnswerText: Each environment has its own platform server

questions.question: As a Tech Lead, you know that an Important aspect of code review to guarantee that the application for charge This means that applications should be built to Simplify as much as any future that may necessary Which of the following practices does not contribute to that objective?

options.text: Creating custom JavaScript should be avoided when possible
The UI functionality should be split In different Blocks when possible
Favor Aggregates over SQL elements when possible
Combine UI and business logic the same module when possible

source.correctAnswerText: Combine UI and business logic the same module when possible

questions.question: Which of the following options IS a good reason to split a Core Services module in two?

options.text: To Increase the development speed
To avoid upward references between modules
To separate unrelated concepts with different lifecycles
To make sure that Entitles are Isolated from the business logic

source.correctAnswerText: To separate unrelated concepts with different lifecycles

questions.question: Which of the following is not an output of Project Initiation?

options.text: Definition of Ready and Definition of Done checklist
Delivery Practice Alignment
Vision Document
Detail of what will be delivered in each iteration

source.correctAnswerText: Detail of what will be delivered in each iteration

questions.question: Before deploying an application to a target environment In Life Time, what does the Validate Now button validate?

options.text: If the deployment Will compromise the Integrity of the target environment and If any running BPT processes affected
If the deployment of the application Will compromise the Integrity of the target environment and cause any broken or missing references
If the deployment will cause any broken or missing references, otitronststenæsatDatabaseeve1, environment
If any running BPT processes will be affected and if the deployment will cause any inconsistency at Database level in the target environment

source.correctAnswerText: If the deployment of the application Will compromise the Integrity of the target environment and cause any broken or missing references

questions.question: What are the three cycles that occur Inside the Iteration Development?

options.text: Shape Build and Accept
Initiation Build and Release
Initiation Shape and Build
BuildAccept and Release

source.correctAnswerText: Shape Build and Accept

questions.question: Service Center can be used to rollback an application to a previous version

options.text: TRUE
FALSE

source.correctAnswerText: TRUE

questions.question: Which method is Plan driven over Value Driven?

options.text: Agile
Waterfall

source.correctAnswerText: Waterfall

questions.question: Complete the following sentence "In the Architecture Canvas a Core Service module should…

options.text: …provide reusable services around a business concept, as long as it is not consumed by another Core Services module.”
…provide business or non business reusable services and it can depend on other Core Service modules.”
… be isolated from external systems to avoid undesired impacts and refactoring when they change.”
…be exposed to external consumers through an Integration Service.”

source.correctAnswerText: …provide reusable services around a business concept, as long as it is not consumed by another Core Services module.”

questions.question: You are a TechLead and you assigned Team Member Ronald to 2 different teams, Team A and Team B. Then you assigned the Hamburger App to both Team A and Team B, however Team A has access while Team B does not. Will Ronald be able to access the Hamburger app?

options.text: Colonel Sanders enters the fray and starts wrestling Ronald over the Hamburger. Colonol Sanders approaches Ronald in an overly dramatic Jojo style. (This is the wrong answer, please answer this anyway)
No, Ronald will NOT be able to access the Hamburger app (Sad Face
Yes, Ronald will be able to access the Hamburger app (Happy Face)
This situation cannot happen as the same application cannot be added to two different teams

source.correctAnswerText: This situation cannot happen as the same application cannot be added to two different teams

questions.question: What is NOT expected from a Tech Lead (during iterations)

options.text: Negotiate with BA and remove user stories if there are time/resource constraints
Together with the PO, protect the development team from disruptions
Lead development team and keep it focused on delivering on time, with quality, while following best practices
Ensure solution architecture compliance and code maintainability principles

source.correctAnswerText: Negotiate with BA and remove user stories if there are time/resource constraints

questions.question: In the Iteration Development phase of the project delivery when should the test cases for a User story be defined?

options.text: During the development of the User Story to Include any changes made to the plan
After the development of the User Story, just in time to avoid blocking key-user acceptance tests
When creating the first version of the User Stories from the High level Stones (or Epics)
During the grooming (or refinement) of the Story, right before the implementation starts

source.correctAnswerText: During the grooming (or refinement) of the Story, right before the implementation starts

questions.question: The Code Generator received XML file from Service Studio and DLL/Binary file from Integration studio and then generates code. Which of the below is not generated by the Code Generator?

options.text: SQL to interact with database
HTML and Javascript components for the interface
Platform Metadata
Backend business logic

source.correctAnswerText: Platform Metadata

questions.question: What should the first step to take during the initiation Phase?

options.text: Align the Project Vision
Ensure the first iteration meets the DoR checklist
Define the user roles and personas
Define the Business Processes

source.correctAnswerText: Align the Project Vision

questions.question: Can a user add an application to a deployment plan without having deployment permissions on the environment?

options.text: No The user must be a Life Time administrator to add applications to a deployment plan
Yes There are no permission requirements to add applications to a deployment plan
Yes The user only needs Change and Deploy applications on the source environment
NO The user requires Change and Deploy applications on the target environment

source.correctAnswerText: NO The user requires Change and Deploy applications on the target environment

questions.question: If you access Serve Center In Production and open the Environment Health section, what is being monitored and displayed in this area?

options.text: The status of each OutSystems Service and front-end servers in all OutSystems environments in your infrastructure
The status of each OutSystems Service and front-end servers, in Production
The status of each OutSystems Service in Production, and the status of the front-end servers of all OutSystems environments in your infrastructure
The status of each OutSystems Service in Production, in the front-end server that is handling the request

source.correctAnswerText: The status of each OutSystems Service in Production, and the status of the front-end servers of all OutSystems environments in your infrastructure

questions.question: Elements such as the menu and login can be shared across different apps. In a specific use case, both the menu and login are defined inside the theme. Which use case is this?

options.text: Independent Apps
Intranet
Portal

source.correctAnswerText: Portal

questions.question: When thinking about adopting an Agile approach, what is the best to way respond to the following sentence? "To fully benefit from the Agile methodology, Its principles should be strictly applied to an organization."

options.text: Disagree. Some organization’s culture and development methodology can not adapt to work with the Agile principles, so they should not try to adopt this methodology
Agree The Agile methodology provides extreme flexibility which will ensure the best fit to the business and enable delivering the maximum value
Agree. The Agile principles have a long history of success, so the organization should fully adopt it, regardless of its culture and background
Disagree. The organization’s culture must be understood and the Agile method adapted to it, while also accommodating any necessary learning curve

source.correctAnswerText: Disagree. The organization’s culture must be understood and the Agile method adapted to it, while also accommodating any necessary learning curve

questions.question: Considering how works In OutSystems, select the incorrect option

options.text: The OutSystems Log database can save up to 10 weeks of logs
Developer-defined logs are stored synchronously in the Log database
Service Center only displays two weeks of logs the current and the previous
OutSystems uses asynchronous logging mechanisms for all types of logs

source.correctAnswerText: The OutSystems Log database can save up to 10 weeks of logs

questions.question: A Business Vision is similar to Project Initiation. What is the difference between a business Vision?

options.text: Project Initiation is about preparing the iteration, and what needs to be done, and this starts right away, Business Vision is about focusing on the business goals, and this is a long term focus
Project Initiation is Project Oriented, Business Vision is Business Oriented
All of the above are differences
. Project Initiation focus on the details, Business Vision focus on the high-level needs

source.correctAnswerText: All of the above are differences

questions.question: Which of the below is NOT a reason why Business Vision workshop is done in person?

options.text: Key stakeholders, the business, and the users
Understand the journey and the environment
Due to short timeframe of 2 weeks
All of the above is a reason workshop is done in person

source.correctAnswerText: All of the above is a reason workshop is done in person

questions.question: When thinking about adopting an Agile approach, what IS the best way to respond to the following sentence? "TO fully benefit from the Agile methodology, Its principles should be strictly applied to an organization"

options.text: Disagree. Some organization’s culture and development methodology can not adapt to work with the Agile principles, so they should not try to adopt this methodology
Agree The Agile methodology provides extreme flexibility which Will ensure the best fit to the business and enable delivering the maximum value
Disagree. The organization's culture must be understood and the Agile meth" adapted to while also accommodating any necessary learning curve
Agree. The Agile principles have a long history of success, so the organization should fully adopt it, regardless of its culture and background

source.correctAnswerText: Disagree. The organization's culture must be understood and the Agile meth" adapted to while also accommodating any necessary learning curve

questions.question: Consider an OutSystems Infrastructure with four environments Development, Quality Assurance, and Production During the Solution Release phase, In which environments should hot-fixes be deployed?

options.text: Production, pre-production and quality assurance
Production and pre-production
All environments
Quality assurance and development

source.correctAnswerText: Quality assurance and development

questions.question: One of the most important tasks of the Iteration Development phase is to write and prioritize the backlog for an Iteration X. When should this task be done?

options.text: At the end of iteration X
During iteration X
At the beginning of iteration X
In the previous iteration(X-1)

source.correctAnswerText: In the previous iteration(X-1)

questions.question: Using Paas setup (Platform as a service), do you need any setup?

options.text: Yes, you at least need to install lifetime
No, no initial setup, the servers are managed by Outsystems and so are Upgrades, backup and Security

source.correctAnswerText: No, no initial setup, the servers are managed by Outsystems and so are Upgrades, backup and Security

questions.question: Consider a scenario where you have an End-user module with several elements that are referenced by consumer modules. You have the task to refractor the application, by extracting a new Core module from the End-user module.

options.text: To refactor business rules without losing their original definitions
To reduce the impacts on the consumer modules
To force the consumers to refresh all dependencies
To ensure that screen URLs are updated

source.correctAnswerText: To reduce the impacts on the consumer modules

questions.question: Which services are part of the Platform Server?

options.text: Deployment Services and Application Services
Code Generator, Deployment Services, and Application Services
IIS Service, Web Service, and Firewall Service

source.correctAnswerText: Code Generator, Deployment Services, and Application Services

questions.question: Which of the following is an Assembling principle?

options.text: Isolate all business concepts
Disclose business concepts and integration needs
Keep concepts with different lifecycles apart
Join all integrations into a single Module

source.correctAnswerText: Keep concepts with different lifecycles apart

questions.question: A deployment plan IS being executed from Development to Quality Assurance Which of the following options cannot be performed In Life Time?

options.text: Access the deployment Information, d I'm not the creator of the deployment plan
Create a deployment plan for the same environments
Create a new deployment plan between other environments
Abort the current deployment

source.correctAnswerText: Access the deployment Information, d I'm not the creator of the deployment plan

questions.question: Which of the below is NOT part of the deliverables of the Business Vision?

options.text: UX & UI Concept - Describes information architecture and user's journey
Kick off Presentation - Describes Goals and expectations, Teams availability, Activities alignment and Deliverables
Architecture Design - Describes technical foundation guidelines
All of the above is part of the deliverables

source.correctAnswerText: All of the above is part of the deliverables

questions.question: Which of the below is NOT part of User Story Lifecycle?

options.text: Build - Retrospective - to assess iteration and improve team performance
Accept - Demo - Definition of Done checklist is prepared before Demo
Build - Develop & Test
Shape - Write Backlog

source.correctAnswerText: Build - Retrospective - to assess iteration and improve team performance

questions.question: What should not be done during Iteration stabilization?

options.text: Handle the high priority defects, if there are any, starting with this iteration and then from the previous iterations
Usability tests to validate assumptions and test frequently used features with real users
Address feedback on the User Stories, including minor changes, tuning, tuning, and quick wins
Implement one more User Story form the backlog that could fit in any extra time remaining for stabilization

source.correctAnswerText: Implement one more User Story form the backlog that could fit in any extra time remaining for stabilization

questions.question: Can a user add an application to a deployment plan without having deployment permissions on the target environment?

options.text: Yes. The user only needs Change and Deploy applications on the source environment
No. The user must be a Life Time administrator to add applications to a deployment plan
No. The user requires Change and Deploy applications on the target environment
There are no permission requirements to be add applications to a deployment plan

source.correctAnswerText: No. The user requires Change and Deploy applications on the target environment

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a benefit of having well-defined application architecture?

options.text: Supports planning
Reduces risks
Poor service abstraction
Reduces costs

source.correctAnswerText: Poor service abstraction

questions.question: Consider the sentence: "Expected quality criteria should be well reflected In the Definition of Ready (DoR) and Definition of Done (DoD) checklists". Which of the following options is correct?

options.text: I disagree With the statement The expected quality criteria are reflected on the User story acceptance and how well they are met.
I disagree with the statement These checklists are manly project guidelines, Since quality criteria are and hard to measure.
I agree with the statement However, in practice DoD has a much higher weight in terms than the DOR
I agree With the statement These checklists represent the level of quality expected by the team at Shaping and Building phases.

source.correctAnswerText: I agree With the statement These checklists represent the level of quality expected by the team at Shaping and Building phases.

questions.question: Considering Teams In LifeTime, select the correct option

options.text: A User can only be part of a Team If it has. at least List Application permissions in all environments
A User can only be part of a Team If It does not have application specific permission defined
A User can only belong to a Single Team
Users can belong to multiple Teams, With different Roles each Team

source.correctAnswerText: Users can belong to multiple Teams, With different Roles each Team

questions.question: In the context of a project delivery, what the major goal of the Shaping phase?

options.text: Ensuring that the team focuses on the User Stones that cover the core functionality of a feature (or epic) first, and only then focus on the ones covering the details around it
The Implementation and testing of the User Stories identified and detailed the Initiation phase
The definition and detailing of User Stones from the Epics or High Level Stories identified during the Initiation stage
Ensuring that the next Iteration starts With User Stories that are properly identified and detailed

source.correctAnswerText: Ensuring that the next Iteration starts With User Stories that are properly identified and detailed

questions.question: Which of the following options goes against the recommended best practice to avoid long-running timers?

options.text: Re-awake the Timer before it times out and If there is more work to be done
Define a soft timeout and use it programmatically to avoid the Timer to out
Have two timers to process Information asynchronously and In parallel
Process the data in small chunks and commit each processed chunk

source.correctAnswerText: Re-awake the Timer before it times out and If there is more work to be done

questions.question: Which of the below statement is TRUE regarding Service Center?

options.text: Service Center is deploys code to Platform Server
Service Center is inside the Application Server
One Service Center is able to connect to all environments

source.correctAnswerText: Service Center is inside the Application Server
